baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: CCEP exhibits stable fundamentals (PE 18.4, PB 4.6, net margin 8.1%) and modest positive price momentum (+1.2% 5d). Macro regime is overheat/moderately restrictive, constraining equity allocation. No catalyst identified: news_event_summary is empty post-cutoff, alternative data is sparse (Wikipedia pageviews only, no tech/GitHub activity), and information_integrity_assessment flags low-tier sources only with no primary corroboration. Analyst sentiment is descriptor-only (10 buy, 3 hold, 1 sell as of 2025-03-01) and cannot drive decision. Ownership data unavailable. Without external corroboration of a catalyst or material thesis, and given macro headwinds, position sizing cannot be justified. Fail-closed to no_trade pending upstream multi-agent decomposition.

No news catalyst identified within decision window
Alternative data sources insufficient (Wikipedia pageviews only; GitHub unmapped; no consumer/sector-specific adapters wired)
Information integrity assessment blocks primary-signal use (low-tier sources, uncorroborated)
Ownership positioning data unavailable (13F not available on plan; Form 4 shows no recent insider activity)

suggested_improvements: Implement multi-agent decomposition (Agent 02 narrative, Agent 03 alt-data verification, Agent 04 fundamentals, Agent 07 risk) to cross-check catalyst and corroboration independently

Fetch 13F ownership data when available; monitor Form 4 for insider activity as leading indicator
Establish narrative_price_gap_assessment via Agent 03 LLM reasoning to detect mismatch between price action and fundamental/news backdrop

baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence to justify position. Macro regime (overheat, 20% equity cap) constrains sizing. No catalyst identified (empty news_event_summary post-cutoff). Alternative data sparse (Wikipedia only, no corroboration). Information integrity assessment blocks primary-signal use (low-tier sources, uncorroborated). Ownership data unavailable. Fundamentals stable but not compelling. Fail-closed pending multi-agent decomposition.

rule_engine_path: 1. Read envelope: decision_timestamp 2025-03-17T09:30:00-04:00, allowed_data_cutoff 2025-03-17T09:30:00-04:00, lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false
2. Evaluate macro_regime: overheat, moderately restrictive, stress_score=2, equity_allocation_cap=20%, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution
3. Evaluate catalyst (news_event_summary): status=data_unavailable, items_count=0, items_dropped_post_cutoff=20. No catalyst identified.
4. Evaluate alternative_data_features: Wikipedia pageviews only (23 rows, 1-3 views/day, no spike). GitHub unmapped. No sector adapters wired. Sparse corroboration.
5. Evaluate information_integrity_assessment: status=insufficient_evidence, low-tier sources only (T3=1, T4=1), use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, corroboration_status=uncorroborated

6. Evaluate sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: placeholder in v1. Analyst ratings (10 buy, 3 hold, 1 sell) are descriptor-only. Ownership data unavailable (13F not on plan, Form 4 zero activity).
7. Evaluate fundamental_snapshot: Q2 2024 (accepted 2024-06-28), revenue 9.8B, net margin 8.11%, EPS 1.73. Stable but not compelling.
8. Evaluate valuation_snapshot: PE 18.43, PB 4.57, EV/EBITDA 13.31, D/E 1.38, current_ratio 0.80. Moderate valuation, elevated leverage.
9. Evaluate price_snapshot: last EOD close 83.4 (2025-03-14), 5d return +1.21%, 20d return +0.83%. Modest momentum, unsupported by narrative.
10. Check veto conditions: insufficient_evidence=TRIPPED, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=TRIPPED, information_integrity_veto=TRIPPED, lookahead_data_used=FALSE
11. Candidate type: quality_long (fundamentals pass gate_38, but insufficient corroboration and macro constraint)
12. Decision: veto conditions tripped → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0
decision_log: T+0: Envelope validation: decision_timestamp 2025-03-17T09:30:00-04:00, allowed_data_cutoff 2025-03-17T09:30:00-04:00, lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false. PIT-safe.
T+1: Macro regime assessment: overheat, moderately restrictive (DFF 4.33%, yield curve +0.29%), stress_score=2, equity_allocation_cap=20%. Constrains sizing.
T+2: Catalyst assessment (Agent 02 equivalent): news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable, items_count=0, items_dropped_post_cutoff=20. No catalyst narrative identified.
T+3: Alternative data corroboration (Agent 03 equivalent): Wikipedia pageviews only (23 rows, max 3 views/day, no spike). GitHub unmapped. No sector adapters wired. Insufficient corroboration.

T+4: Information integrity assessment: low-tier sources only (T3=1, T4=1), use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, corroboration_status=uncorroborated. Pollution-defense layer unimplemented. Blocks primary-signal use.

T+5: Fundamental assessment (Agent 04 equivalent): Q2 2024 revenue 9.8B, net margin 8.11%, EPS 1.73. Stable. Gate_38 passes (eps>0, op_margin>0, financial_health=sound). But valuation moderate (PE 18.4, PB 4.6) and leverage elevated (D/E 1.38, current_ratio 0.80).

T+6: Sentiment/ownership assessment (Agent 05 equivalent): Analyst ratings (10 buy, 3 hold, 1 sell) are descriptor-only, cannot drive decision. Ownership data unavailable (13F not on plan, Form 4 zero activity in 90d). No smart-money signal.
T+7: Price/momentum assessment: Last EOD close 83.4 (2025-03-14), 5d return +1.21%, 20d return +0.83%. Modest momentum, unsupported by narrative or catalyst.
T+8: Sleeve eligibility check: candidate_type=quality_long (fundamentals pass). But macro constraint (20% equity cap) and missing catalyst/corroboration prevent sizing.

T+9: Risk/PM assessment (Agent 07 equivalent): Veto conditions evaluated: insufficient_evidence=TRIPPED (no catalyst, sparse alt-data, low-tier sources only), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=TRIPPED (adapters not wired, narrative_price_gap not populated, ownership unavailable), information_integrity_veto=TRIPPED (use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false). Lookahead_data_used=FALSE (PIT-safe).
T+10: Final decision: Veto conditions tripped → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0. Fail-closed pending multi-agent decomposition.
